'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: create table courses (id bigint generated by default as identity, credits integer not null, description varchar(2000), name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table enrollments (id bigint generated by default as identity, enrolled_at timestamp(6), grade float(53), status enum ('COMPLETED','DROPPED','ENROLLED'), course_id bigint not null, student_id bigint not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table students (id bigint generated by default as identity, age integer not null check ((age>=16) and (age<=120)), bio varchar(1000), email varchar(255) not null, gpa float(53) not null, name varchar(100) not null, password varchar(255) not null, role enum ('ADMIN','STUDENT'), username varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists courses drop constraint if exists UK5o6x4fpafbywj4v2g0owhh11r Hibernate: alter table if exists
